model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Profile link in the dropdown menu
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (194,92) said dx=348 dy=367 conf=0.90 -> (542,459)
  iter 1: at (542,459) said dx=80 dy=-138 conf=0.90 -> (622,321)
  iter 2: at (582,390) said dx=54 dy=-40 conf=0.90 -> (636,350)
  iter 3: at (596,380) said dx=36 dy=-22 conf=0.90 -> (632,358)
  iter 4: at (604,374) said dx=37 dy=-26 conf=0.90 -> (642,348)
  iter 5: at (614,368) said dx=-6 dy=-10 conf=0.95 -> (608,358)
  iter 6: at (612,366) said dx=35 dy=-20 conf=0.90 -> (647,346)
  iter 7: at (621,360) said dx=15 dy=0 conf=0.90 -> (636,360)
  iter 8: at (625,360) said dx=-124 dy=136 conf=0.90 -> (501,496)
  iter 9: at (594,394) said dx=37 dy=-53 conf=0.90 -> (631,342)
  iter 10: at (603,381) said dx=41 dy=-35 conf=0.90 -> (644,346)
Call report_offset().

"Profile" text is to the right of the crosshair.
The center of "Profile" link (icon + text) seems to be around (500, 500)?

The "P" is around x=485. The "e" is around x=535. Center x ~ 510.
The y-coordinate of the "Profile" line is around 500.
Current crosshair is at (478, 515).
Target center is around (510, 500).
dx = 510 - 478 = 32.
dy = 500 - 515 = -15.
Let's look closer at the crosshair.
It's actually quite close to the "Profile" text.
The red crosshair center is at (478, 515).
The "Profile" link area:
Icon is at (470, 500) roughly.
Text "Profile" is at (510, 500) roughly.
The target is "the Profile link". Usually, the whole line is clickable.
Center of the line "Profile" (icon + text) is around (500, 500).
Let's check the blue circle. It is centered around (477, 514).
The text "Profile" is to the right.
Let's estimate the center of the "Profile" link.
The link spans from x ~ 458 (start of icon) to x ~ 536 (end of text).
Center x = (458 + 536) / 2 = 497.
The y-coordinate is around 500.
Current crosshair is at (478, 516).
dx = 497 - 478 = 19.
dy = 500 - 516 = -16.
Let's try a simpler estimate.

The crosshair is at x ~ 478.
dx = 510 - 478 = 32.
The text "Profile" y is ~ 500.
The crosshair y is ~ 516.
dy = 500 - 516 = -16.

If iter 10 was at (603,381) and dx=41, dy=-35, the target was at (644, 346).

dx = 490 - 478 = 12.
dy = 500 - 516 = -16.

Let's look at the blue circle again. It's around the crosshair.

The "Profile" link's text center: x ~ 508, y ~ 500.
The crosshair is at x ~ 478, y ~ 516.
dx = 508 - 478 = 30.
dy = 500 - 516 = -16.

Let's try: dx=30, dy=-16, conf=0.9.
